distance_convention.d: Equals bit_flip_distance; the X-only (bit-flip) code distance. It is NOT a full quantum distance.
distance_convention.bit_flip_distance: 3 - corrects any single X error under the declared Pauli bit-flip model.
distance_convention.quantum_distance: 1 - the code provides no protection against Z (phase) errors, so the quantum code distance is 1.

notes: Distance 3 against bit-flip errors only; single X error correction claim.
